comment: Cancelling: routine [' + 'c6af9585' + '](/ZAI/routines/c6af9585-a736-4376-80de-c1f7fb7d6afc) just paused. CTO root cause on [ZAI-113](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-113): ' + chr(96) + 'skip_if_active' + chr(96) + ' evaluates run-record state, not issue state, so each fire spawns a fresh duplicate. Holding the monitor until the platform fix lands; CEO will run health checks on demand or re-enable the routine after the bug is fixed.
